factors.rationale: The product is visible but competes with the person's hand and background.
The accessory is shown being held in a realistic outdoor context.
The text highlights the benefit of keeping essentials locked in place.
The layout is clear with readable text and a focused product.
The image shows texture and details of the case clearly.
The brand and product details are presented in a trustworthy manner.
Strong contrast and clear text make the image readable.
The image conveys a clear campaign message with a lifestyle context.
